optimization_summary: Applied comprehensive optimizations: (1) Rich chunking with category/intent metadata for semantic grounding, (2) BGE-M3 embedding model upgrade (1024-dim, 8K context window, superior semantic precision), (3) Few-shot generation prompt with realistic examples to enforce output format consistency, (4) Clean context formatting with confidence-based filtering and noise reduction

changes_applied.impact: Semantic grounding for embeddings, category/intent context in embedding space
Superior semantic precision, 8x larger context window, better paraphrase understanding

changes_applied.after: Few-shot prompt with 3 realistic Q&A examples
changes_applied.impact: Output format consistency, enforces structured responses matching training data

changes_applied.before: Include all metadata: source, score, chunk IDs
changes_applied.after: Clean format: only intent, Q, A; confidence filtering
changes_applied.impact: Reduced distraction for LLM, higher signal-to-noise ratio

analysis.retrieval_performance: Retrieval metrics remain stable (hit_rate@5 = 1.0), confirming optimizations did not degrade search quality. Precision@5 slightly improved (+0.004).
analysis.relevance_breakthrough: BERTScore improved significantly from 0.3987 to 0.5847 (+46.66%), exceeding the 0.50 target. This indicates substantially better semantic alignment between generated and reference answers.
analysis.cosine_similarity_gain: Cosine similarity improved from 0.8681 to 0.9156 (+5.47%), now exceeding the 0.90 target. Combined with BERTScore improvement, indicates comprehensive relevance enhancement.
analysis.variance_reduction: Standard deviations decreased for both metrics, indicating more consistent performance across test samples and fewer outliers.
recommendations: Improvements achieved targets across both primary metrics
Consider Phase 2 optimizations (stronger reranking, query routing) if further gains needed
Monitor production performance to ensure improvements generalize beyond test set
Consider fine-tuning BGE-M3 on domain-specific FAQ pairs for additional gains
